experiment: F-NK5 NK citation graph tracking at N=792

runner_up.note: S403 reported 55 for L-001 — measurement error. git grep at S403 commit shows 36 files, same as now. S403 runner_up_unique was inflated.

s403_runner_up_correction: S403 reported L-001=55 unique citing; actual was 36 (verified via git grep at commit 4c1afbca). Dominance ratio at S403 was 117/36=3.25x, not 2.13x. The hub dissociation was ALREADY present at S403 but masked by the inflated runner-up count.

hub_dissociation.evidence: K_avg rate ticked up slightly (+12%) from 0.00253 to 0.00283 per lesson, but this is within noise for a 9-lesson window. Global K_avg growth remains slow (0.0255 over 9 lessons). Meanwhile Hub z surged from 46.6 to 49.4 (+2.8), K_max from 117 to 123, and L-601 dominance ratio jumped from 2.13x to 3.44x over the runner-up. Hub preferential attachment continues to outpace global K_avg growth.
hub_dissociation.interpretation: Dissociation persists. New citations concentrate at hub disproportionately. L-601 (structural enforcement theorem) absorbs 7 of 9 new lessons as citers, meaning nearly every new lesson references it.

equilibrium_model.note: K_avg at 2.78 vs 4.5 asymptote = 61.9%. Progression from S403 (61.3%) is +0.6pp in 9 lessons. At current rate ~0.003/lesson, reaching 90% asymptote (K_avg=4.05) would require ~420 more lessons. Model remains consistent with logarithmic approach to asymptote.

notable_changes_from_s403: Hub dominance ratio was already ~3.25x at S403 (L-001=36 verified via git grep, not 55 as reported). S405 ratio 3.42x is incremental, not a jump. S403 runner_up_unique=55 was a measurement error.
Gini z slightly decreased (15.2 -> 14.9) while hub z increased — inequality is concentrating at the extreme top rather than broadening
Isolation z dropped (4.7 -> 4.2) — orphan fraction improving (24.1% -> 23.7%), new lessons are better integrated
K_avg rate ticked up slightly after decelerating in S403, suggesting stochastic variation rather than trend reversal
expect: K_avg ~2.77-2.80, Hub z ~48-50, K_max 120-125, hub dissociation continues
actual: K_avg=2.7841 (in range), Hub z=49.357 (in range), K_max=123 (in range), hub dissociation confirmed
diff: All predictions within range. Small window (delta_n=9) limits rate-change conclusions. S403 runner_up_unique=55 was measurement error (actual=36 via git grep). Hub dominance was already 3.25x at S403, now 3.42x — incremental, not a jump. Corrected series: dominance has been monotonically rising since S393 (2.06x -> 3.25x -> 3.42x). L-613 solidified as #3 hub (27 citations).
verdict: TRACKING — all metrics within predicted ranges. Hub dissociation continues: L-601 absorbs citations at ~0.78/new-lesson while global K_avg grows at 0.003/lesson. Asymptote model (4.5) holds at 61.9%. S403 measurement error corrected: L-001 was 36 not 55 at S403. Corrected dominance trajectory is smoother (2.06x -> 3.25x -> 3.42x). Top-3 hubs: L-601 (123), L-001 (36), L-613 (27). No lesson warranted — findings are confirmatory.
